title: Sweet Cream
description: An old-style classic that never disappoints! Made from the simplest ingredients-- milk, cream, sugar, eggs. Bonus: perfect with any topping!

title: Dark Chocolate
description: Rich, velvety, dark chocolate ice cream. The perfect middle-ground between our Milk Chocolate and Double Dark Chocolate ice creams.

title: Planet Earth
description: Our vanilla ice cream that we dye blue with butterfly pea flower powder! We toss in pieces of housemade brownies and matcha cake, so each scoop looks like a little planet Earth!

title: Black Licorice
description: An old-timey classic flavor we love to bring bring back every now and again! Pure anise goodness (no icky food coloring required).

title: Lemon Poppy Seed
description: A Leones' Creamery classic! Sweet, lemony ice cream that tastes JUST like one of our favorite pound cakes.

title: Chocolate Kit Kat
description: Creamy, malted chocolate ice cream full of chopped KitKat bars!

title: Cherry Chip
description: Sweet, nostalgic cherry ice cream, chock-full of mini chocolate chips

title: Vegan Almond w/ Orange Marmalade
description: Vegan, coconut milk ice cream with toasted almonds and a swirl of housemade orange marmalade.
